stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Honey is a natural — and economically important — product that is obtained from bees.
  • China is a leading producer of honey.
  • The flavor of honey varies across honeybee subspecies and the flowers they forage.
  • Italian honeybees produce mild, pale honey that is used in baking.
  • Carniolan honeybees produce mild, pale honey that is used in baking.
  • Caucasian honeybees produce dark, robust honey that is used in barbecue sauces and glazes.
stem: The student wants to emphasize how Caucasian honey differs from Italian and Carniolan honey. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: Caucasian honey is just one of the many kinds of honey, each originating from a different subspecies of honeybee.
Honeybee honey varies from subspecies to subspecies, so Caucasian honey will be different than other kinds of honey.
Honey is an economically important product — especially in China — that can be used in baking or even in barbecue sauces and glazes.
The mild, pale honey produced by Italian and Carniolan honeybees is used in baking, whereas the dark, robust honey of Caucasian honeybees is used in barbecue sauces and glazes.

rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. This choice most effectively emphasizes how Caucasian honey differs from Italian and Carniolan honey. It describes the difference in flavor and color as well as the difference in what they are used for.

Choice A is incorrect. This choice does not emphasize how Caucasian honey differs from Italian and Carniolan honey; it does not mention Italian or Carniolan honey at all. Choice B is incorrect. This choice does not emphasize how Caucasian honey differs from Italian and Carniolan honey; it does not mention Italian or Carniolan honey at all. Choice C is incorrect. This choice does not emphasize how Caucasian honey differs from Italian and Carniolan honey; it does not mention Caucasian, Italian, or Carniolan honey at all.
